name: Berry Frost
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, blend all ingredients at low speed until smooth and frothy.
2. Pour the mixture into a glass.
Approximate Nutrient Analysis per Serving:
150 calories, 9 g protein, 2 g fat, 23 g carbohydrate, 8 mg cholesterol,
115 g sodium, 550 g potassium
Food Group Units:
1 Fruit, 1/2 Sugar
